<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Account; use Psr\Container\ContainerInterface; use Vonage\Client\APIResource; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler\BasicHandler; class ClientFactory { public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container): Client { /** @var APIResource $accountApi */ $accountApi = $container->make(APIResource::class); $accountApi ->setBaseUrl($accountApi->getClient()->getRestUrl()) ->setIsHAL(false) ->setBaseUri('/account') ->setAuthHandlers(new BasicHandler()) ; return new Client($accountApi); } }
